name: Queen of the Forest
overview: TVB repackaged BBC documentary "Serengeti" and used the Cantonese voices of the actors from "The Queen of News," including Kenneth Ma as "George," Samantha Ko as "Cathy," Venus Wong as "Liu Yan," Ho Yee-ting as "Hiao Wei," Tang Chi-kin as "Fei Ye," Mimi Kung as "Fang Tai," Bella Kwok, Matthew Ho, Hera Chan as "Zhi Yao," Hei-ka Ho as "Shan Shan," Kong Tak-yin as "Cyrus," Ma Kwun-tung, Lo Fu, Miu Ka-hing, Shaun Tam, and Joel Chan to form "Queen of the Forest."

trailers.title: 森林女王｜《新聞女王》由辦公室鬥到入森林原野 上演最原始生存之道｜《新聞女王》演員馬國明、高海寧、何依婷、鄧智堅、龔慈恩、王敏奕、郭柏妍、何廣沛、陳曉華粵語配音｜Serengeti野生動物紀錄片
